nasb.text: He brought out the people who were in it, and cut them with saws and with sharp instruments and with axes. And thus David did to all the cities of the sons of Ammon. Then David and all the people returned to Jerusalem.

esv.text: And he brought out the people who were in it and set them to labor  with saws and iron picks and axes. And thus David did to all the cities of the Ammonites. Then David and all the people returned to Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 又把城裡的眾民拉出來，要他們用鋸子、鐵鏟和斧子作工；大衛待亞捫各城的人都是這樣。後來大衛和眾民都回耶路撒冷去了。

ccb.text: 他把城里的人带出来，命他们用锯、铁耙和斧头做工。他用同样的方法对待亚扪其他城邑的居民。之后，大卫和全军返回耶路撒冷。
